# Q5: What are our most returned products?

## Generated SQL

```sql
SELECT p.name AS product_name,
       p.category,
       COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders,
       COUNT(DISTINCT r.return_id) AS return_count,
       ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT r.return_id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 2) AS return_rate_pct
FROM products p
JOIN orders o ON p.product_id = o.product_id
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.order_id = r.order_id
GROUP BY p.product_id
HAVING total_orders >= 5
ORDER BY return_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
```

**Confidence:** 0.93

## Results

| Product Name | Category | Total Orders | Return Count | Return Rate % |
|-------------|----------|-------------|-------------|--------------|
| Budget Laptop | Electronics | 89 | 18 | 20.22% |
| Wireless Mouse | Electronics | 142 | 16 | 11.27% |
| Office Suite Basic | Software | 78 | 14 | 17.95% |
| Ergonomic Chair | Office | 95 | 12 | 12.63% |
| USB-C Hub | Electronics | 110 | 11 | 10.00% |
| Antivirus Standard | Software | 65 | 10 | 15.38% |
| Webcam HD | Electronics | 88 | 9 | 10.23% |
| Desk Lamp | Office | 72 | 8 | 11.11% |
| Printer Paper Ream | Office | 55 | 7 | 12.73% |
| External SSD 1TB | Electronics | 93 | 7 | 7.53% |

## Narrative

**The Budget Laptop has an alarming 20.22% return rate** — 1 in 5 units sold comes back. Combined with its high order volume (89 orders), this is likely costing significant revenue in return processing, restocking, and customer satisfaction.

Electronics dominates the returns list (5 of top 10), suggesting a systemic quality or expectation-setting issue in the category. The Office Suite Basic (17.95% return rate) also warrants investigation — software returns often indicate licensing or compatibility issues that could be addressed with better pre-sale qualification.

**Recommendation:** Investigate the Budget Laptop supplier quality and consider whether this product should remain in the catalog. The revenue from 89 orders may not justify the operational cost of 18 returns.
